name: india-jobs-pipeline
description: Run, validate, and summarize the India jobs AI exposure pipeline.

interface.shortDescription: Rebuild and validate the India jobs dataset and static site.
interface.longDescription: Runs the seed or full India jobs pipeline, validates generated outputs, and summarizes changes in generated dataset and site artifacts for this repository.
defaultPrompt: Run the India seed pipeline and validate outputs.
Rebuild site data and summarize what changed.
Check whether this repo is ready for a Pages deploy.
